// A.D.D V3 manifesto — XS3. Reading key: `subject predicate object .` = one edge; ; keeps subject; , keeps subject+predicate; {} = pattern; !mark = deontic.
#add a architecture-method; name "A.D.D V3"; mark 📐; tone strict-dip-first, absolute-layer-isolation.
contract-is-law law "contract defines truth; implementations adhere strictly" !🔒.
{?x change contract-silently} mark 🚨.

// F.A.P
{?m a module} => {?m layer bootstrap, operators, core-abstractions, implementations, boundary} !🔒.
{?s a module; nested-in ?m} => {?s lives-in implementations-of ?m} !🔒.
{?m invent custom-layer-type} mark 🚫.
system-root a module !🔒; gloss "root obeys the same law — top-level modules live in the ROOT's implementations, never beside the root"; path-demo "/Implementations/OrderModule/Implementations/PayFastAdapter".

// layers + purity
bootstrap duty "composition root, DI"; may-ref all-layers.
{bootstrap hold business-logic} mark 🚫.
operators duty "business orchestration: TGO (strong), Coordinator (eventual)"; may-ref boundary, core-abstractions; gloss "framework-agnostic: DTO in, DTO out".
{operators ref implementations} mark 🚫.
{operators import tech} mark 🚫.
core-abstractions duty "Ports, Entities, Core Events, RuleSets"; may-ref nothing.
{core-abstractions hold tech-or-logic} mark 🚫.
implementations duty "adapters, ACL, UI/web frameworks, sub-modules"; may-ref core-abstractions.
{implementations hold business-logic} mark 🚫.
{?a a system-edge-adapter} => {?a may-ref boundary}; demo <api-client webhook-handler external-mq-consumer>.
boundary duty "DTOs, Boundary Events"; may-ref nothing.
{boundary hold logic} mark 🚫.

// communication + enforcement
{?a a module. ?b a module. ?a message ?b} => {?a via port-call, core-event} !🔒.
{operators-of ?a call operators-of ?b} mark 🚫.
{dto in boundary} handled-by operators.
{?ad a adapter} => {?ad implement port-in-core-abstractions}.
{?d a circular-dependency} mark 🚨.
{?d a upward-dependency} mark 🚨.
on-violation halt "CONTRACT IS LAW! ARCHITECTURE VIOLATION DETECTED. REVERTING." !🚨.
